a:r.a:t: Lever determination:
Discovery phase will help guide which levers will be most impactful
McKinsey & Company
McK
Asset enabled
Transformation Dimension
Example Levers
Reach the right opportunities
With the right people & GTM model
With the right offer and perfect pitch
At the right price
Every single time
Free up seller time to increase new customer hunting
Reallocate top sellers to highest-value accounts and accounts at risk of churning
Shift sales rep coverage toward underpenetrated segments and adjacencies
Redesign territories and coverage to match opportunity density
Differentiate roles (hunters, farmers, specialists) to increase focus
Implement performance transparency and raise the bar on rep productivity
Simplify and bundle the offer to increase deal size and win rate
Equip sellers with selling playbooks and next-best-offer guidance
Standardize sales messaging to sharpen value articulation
Reduce unnecessary discounting and enforce pricing guardrails
Pass through cost increases systematically
Increase prices on low-sensitivity / non-key value items
Run regular surveys to sales leadership and reps to understand pain points
Align incentives to growth priorities (e.g., cross-sell, new customer hunting)
Build frontline coaching to sustain performance
Not exhasutive
Example follows
